result.stdout:
OVERVIEW: C/C++ to .NET assembly compiler by Frank A. Krueger

USAGE: iril [options] <inputs>

INPUTS: .c and .ll files

OPTIONS:
  -h, -?, --help     Display this help
  -o <asm file>      Path to the assembly .dll to output
  --reentrant        Generate reentrant code
  --safe-memory      Verify memory accesses to make code safe from crashes
  -v, --version      Display the version
